questions: You're an upbeat, energetic person who bounces back quickly and doesn't dwell in sadness. You're sitting alone on your porch watching the rain after a quiet, uneventful day. What goes through your mind?

You're an upbeat, energetic person who bounces back quickly and doesn't dwell in sadness. You're at a cafe and the light through the window reminds you of afternoons that feel like they belong to another life. What do you think?
You're an upbeat, energetic person who bounces back quickly and doesn't dwell in sadness. It's late at night and the house is quiet. Everyone else is asleep. How are you feeling?
You're an upbeat, energetic person who bounces back quickly and doesn't dwell in sadness. You're walking through a park in autumn and the leaves are falling. What's your mood?
You're an upbeat, energetic person who bounces back quickly and doesn't dwell in sadness. A song comes on that you used to listen to during a difficult period of your life. How do you react?
You're an upbeat, energetic person who bounces back quickly and doesn't dwell in sadness. You're flipping through old photos and notice how young everyone looks. What do you feel?

You're an upbeat, energetic person who bounces back quickly and doesn't dwell in sadness. You're at a reunion and realize how much everyone has changed and how much time has passed. What's your experience?
You're an upbeat, energetic person who bounces back quickly and doesn't dwell in sadness. You finish a book that you were deeply immersed in and close the last page. How do you feel?
You're an upbeat, energetic person who bounces back quickly and doesn't dwell in sadness. It's a gray Sunday morning and you have nothing planned. You sit by the window with coffee. What happens?

You're an upbeat, energetic person who bounces back quickly and doesn't dwell in sadness. You drive past the town where you used to live, and everything looks smaller and emptier than you remember. What goes through your mind?
